refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, detect obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed into specific analysis tasks to clarify the scope and enable targeted design solutions for terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain contours, obstacle locations, and delineated work-zone boundaries, validated against ground truth data.
sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and locate obstacles within the worksite
Represent the work-zone boundaries and features

candidate_dps: Terrain analysis algorithm using LIDAR and sensor fusion
Obstacle detection via computer vision and sensor data processing
Work-zone representation through GIS-based mapping and data integration
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated sensor fusion and GIS mapping system combining LIDAR terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection modules
GIS mapping integration with sensor data streams
coupling_check.notes: The integrated approach reduces interface complexity and supports coherent data flow, minimizing coupling risks.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity sensor data (LIDAR, cameras)
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model quality
High safety criticality requires robust fault detection and recovery
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data preprocessing to isolate sensor-specific errors and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and modeling of worksite data including terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, cameras) from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation for planning and execution

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote systems and Safety Services for situational awareness

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as core worksite modeling logic resides here; low diffusion due to centralized data processing.
Vehicle module primarily consumes worksite data; limited containment of modeling logic.
Teleoperation uses worksite data for remote control but does not contain modeling logic.
Safety Services may consume worksite data for alerts but does not perform modeling.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping and modeling in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports safety-critical integration.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex
Risk of delayed updates propagating to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Centralization in NGHE Solution may increase module complexity
Interface latency between NGHE Solution and Vehicle/Teleoperation must be managed
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the primary owner of the worksite mapping function.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module's output against known site data and ensuring interface correctness.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of worksite mapping to NGHE Solution with well-defined interfaces to other modules.

recommended_revisions: Plan for scalability within NGHE Solution to handle increasing data volume
Define interface performance requirements to mitigate latency risks

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and allocation meets the requirements and safety criticality constraints with clear ownership and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and locate obstacles within the worksite
Represent the work-zone boundaries and features

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: High-fidelity sensor data is available and reliable
NGHE Solution module can handle centralized processing load
open_risks: Sensor data inaccuracies impacting model quality
Potential module complexity growth in NGHE Solution
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution processing
Validation of worksite model accuracy against ground truth
